Hearing On The Petition To Approve The Compromise Of A Disputed Claim Of A Minor.
Off Calendar May-13-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for hearing on the Petition to Approve the Compromise of a Disputed Claim of a Minor.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Robert Sheridan, Esq. appeared for petitioner Rady Cheng, the Guardian ad Litem for the minor, Reamcy Cheng.
Order waiving the appearance of petitioner and the minor at today's hearing was filed May 12, 2010.

On the basis of evidence received, and good cause appearing, the Petition is granted and compromise is approved.

Settlement Amount - $15,000.00.
Attorney's Fees - $3,715.58.
Costs - $137.67.

The net balance of $11,146.75 shall be deposited into a blocked account with Wells Fargo - Main Branch, located on California Street at Montgomery Street, San Francisco, CA. No withdrawals shall be made without a written Court Order, or until the minor reaches the age of 18 years.

Orders Approving the Compromise of a Disputed Claim of a Minor, and to Deposit Money into a Blocked Account, were submitted to and signed by the Court.

Matter is continued to June 29, 2010 @ 9:00 a.m. in Department 218 for a Progress Report re: Receipt and Acknowledgment of Order for the Deposit of Money into a Blocked Account.

CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
